state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?
user: Wants help canceling or returning some recently purchased items after deciding to stop gaming and focus on studies.
assistant: Said it could help and asked for the email address to authenticate the account.
user: Provided the email mia.garcia2723@example.com.

candidate_answers.text: Thanks, Mia. I’ll look up your account using that email so I can review your recent orders and see what can be canceled versus returned.
The user has now supplied the requested account identifier, so the grounded next step is to authenticate the customer before discussing any order-specific cancellation or return options.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose an early authentication turn where the user supplies the exact email the assistant requested, making account lookup the most direct grounded next action.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible state. Highest score goes to the action that converts the provided email into an authenticated customer identity without skipping retrieval steps.
notes: query comes directly from the visible user message and not from hidden task fields
history_summary stops at the decision point and excludes later order retrieval or return execution
available actions are restricted to actions that are domain-appropriate for this episode family
get_user_details and get_order_details are scored below email lookup because the user_id has not been established yet
